flight.title: Flight Deck Builder
flight.intro: Pick a primary control, a throttle, rudder pedals and panels — we tally the cost and flag the platform and aircraft-pairing gotchas. Confirm USB ports and a powered hub for multi-panel decks.

space.title: Cockpit Builder
space.intro: Build a HOSAS, HOTAS or hybrid setup. Two analog sticks (HOSAS) cover all six axes of spaceflight; a stick-and-throttle (HOTAS) suits exploration and cargo. Most boutique gear is PC-only.

golf.title: Sim Room Builder
golf.intro: Spec a launch monitor, enclosure, impact screen and mat. Match the monitor to your software and your room — radar units need depth behind you, overhead units need 9–10 ft of ceiling.

marine.title: Helm Builder
marine.intro: Marine sim runs on repurposed and DIY gear. Pick a helm, engine controls, a rudder and a DIY/VR option — then verify your chosen sim actually reads analog axes (many only read keyboard input).
